Python LLM / RAG Pipeline Engineer

Company: EXAai Demo Labs
Location: Remote (US/EU time zones)
Experience: Mid-level (3–5 years Python, or 2+ years with strong RAG portfolio)

About the role
We are hiring an engineer to own our production Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) stack: document ingestion, chunking, embeddings, vector search, LLM orchestration, and evaluation. You will ship reliable Python services that power candidate screening and internal knowledge tools—not one-off notebooks.

Key responsibilities
- Design and maintain end-to-end RAG pipelines (ingest, chunk, embed, retrieve, rerank, generate).
- Build async Python APIs (FastAPI) that expose screening and Q&A workflows to product teams.
- Integrate Gemini or OpenAI-class models with strict JSON outputs and guardrails.
- Operate vector stores (Pinecone, pgvector, or similar) and tune recall/latency.
- Add observability: tracing, retrieval metrics, hallucination checks, and regression evals.
- Collaborate with security on PII redaction, SSRF-safe crawlers, and prompt-injection defenses.

Requirements:
- Must have: 3+ years professional Python development
- Must have: Production experience building RAG or LLM-backed applications
- Must have: FastAPI (or Flask) and REST API design
- Required: LangChain, LlamaIndex, or equivalent orchestration frameworks
- Required: Embeddings, chunking strategies, and vector database query patterns
- Required: Prompt engineering and structured JSON outputs from LLMs
- Required: Git, code review, and unit/integration testing in Python

Nice to have:
- Preferred: PostgreSQL and pgvector
- Preferred: Docker and CI/CD (GitHub Actions)
- Preferred: Evaluation frameworks (RAGAS, custom golden sets, A/B on retrieval)
- Bonus: Exa or web enrichment for external evidence in pipelines
- Bonus: Google ADK or agent tool-calling patterns
- Bonus: Kubernetes and horizontal scaling of inference workers
